basic_details.job_title: TNAU Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for SRF, Field Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) Temporary Employment Opportunity Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.tnau.ac.in. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the TNAU Walk-in Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree, M.Sc. (Agri.), B.Sc. (Agricultural), Diploma in Agriculture
qualification.details: Research Assistant/Fellow: Master's Degree from Farm University, M.Sc. (Agri.) in Biotechnology / Plant Pathology with four years Bachelors degree from Farm University, M.Sc. Biotechnology, M.Tech. Biotechnology, M.Sc. Biochemistry, M.Sc. Microbiology, M.Sc. Botany, M.Sc. (Agri.) – Agronomy, B.Sc. (Agricultural), Diploma in Agriculture.

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU), a renowned institution in agricultural education and research.

faq.question: Q2. What type of employment is offered?
faq.answer: The employment offered is temporary in nature, providing an opportunity for candidates to gain experience in research.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the SRF, Field Assistant and More posts.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum and maximum qualifications required?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a Diploma in Agriculture, while higher qualifications like M.Sc. (Agri.) and Master's Degrees in relevant fields are also accepted.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for these positions?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly with their documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Tamil Nadu Agricultural University (TNAU) in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must bring all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific dates for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Yes, there are two interview dates mentioned: 15 May 2026 and 21 May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification, suggesting it might be free to apply.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find more detailed information about the recruitment?
faq.answer: For more detailed information, candidates are advised to refer to the official notification PDF and the official website of TNAU.
